# Email: Your Loom profile is now on Atlassian – log in to continue

**Status:** pending

Review and action this email.

- [ ] Reply / Forward / Delegate
- [ ] Move to Done

## Body

Atlassian       We’ve logged you out to complete your
migration. Log back in with the same credentials
<https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/30773215/www.loom.com?>
      Access your workspace now            Jump back into Loom
<https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/30773215/www.loom.com?>                                 Hi akasha,    
Great news! Your Loom profile has been successfully migrated to Atlassian. 
   As part of this new integration, we've logged you out of Loom. Simply
log back in with your *existing Loom credentials* to pick up right where
you left off.      What this means for you          •   *All your videos
and workspaces are safe* — nothing has been moved or lost            •
  *Same login, new destination* — use your existing credentials to sign
in through Atlassian            •   *Better integrations ahead* — this
is just the first step toward seamless access to Confluence, Jira, and the
full Atlassian suite               Helpful Resources:          •   *Want
to know more about this change?* Check out our support article
<https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/30773215/support.atlassian.com?> on this
move.            •   *Are you having trouble logging in?* This article
<https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/30773215/support.atlassian.com?> will help
you troubleshoot.         Ready to explore what's new?           Log into
Loom <https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/30773215/www.loom.com?>          Welcome to the next chapter of
Loom,     The Loom Team                  Read in browser •
